fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnet progress: bal-devnet-2 running, devnet-3 delayed pending EIP-8037 resolution
SSZ experiments for engine API proposed as non-consensus change
Frame transactions headliner decision delayed 2 weeks; default is rejection without additional client support

critical_infrastructure.highlight: EIP-8037 concerns raised: gas accounting complexity across 7928, 7778, 8037, blob gas needs principled alignment
8037 implementation complexity: refund logic, state gas reservoir, testing gaps identified

testing_progress.highlight: bal-devnet-2: Aragon syncing issues being fixed; benchmarking shows prefetch slower than expected
bal-devnet-3 blocked: most clients not ready for EIP-8037; test release 5.4.0 available
epbs-devnet-0: running 1 week, Lighthouse/Lone Star/Prism working; Teku/Nimbus joining; exits/builders not working

repricing_updates.highlight: Repricing breakout scheduled next Wednesday to address 8037 complexity and align with 7928

headliner_selection.highlight: SSZ/Pure ETH rejected as Hegotá headliner; focus on out-of-protocol implementation
Lucid rejected as Hegotá headliner; can be reconsidered for I-Star
Frame transactions support: 2 clients favor (Geth, Aragon); 3 prefer no headliner (Nethermind split, Besu, Reth)
Post-quantum urgency highlighted: DAO migration timeline 2028-2029 requires native AA soon

action_items.action: Repricing breakout next Wednesday: address 8037/7928 alignment and mempool rule clarity
action_items.owner: Maria Silva, Andrew Ashikhmin, all interested teams

action_items.action: Frame transactions champions: develop prototype mempool rules, clarify 8141 txpool spec for 2-week review

decisions.decision: SSE/Pure ETH rejected as Hegotá headliner
Frame transactions headliner decision delayed to March 26; requires Besu, Nethermind, or Reth support to proceed

targets.target: March 19 - Repricing breakout to resolve EIP-8037/7928 alignment
March 26 - Final frame transactions headliner decision
